accounts.name: user_token_account

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Invalid stake amount (must be between 1,000 and 50,000 VELA)

errors.name: AmountMustBeWholeNumber
errors.msg: Stake amount must be a whole number (no decimals)

errors.name: InvalidOrderIndex
errors.msg: Order not found or invalid index

errors.name: WalletMappingNotFound
errors.msg: User wallet mapping not found - must bind referrer first

errors.name: UserNotInReferralSystem
errors.msg: User not in referral system - must bind referrer before staking

errors.name: DailyDepositCapExceeded
errors.msg: Amount exceeds daily deposit cap remaining

errors.name: UserStakeCapExceeded
errors.msg: User total staked exceeds per-address cap

errors.name: ClaimTooFrequent
errors.msg: Claim too frequent: must wait at least 1 hour between claims

errors.name: NftOwnershipMismatch
errors.msg: NFT ownership mismatch: user does not hold the NFT

types.name: AirdropVault
docs: Airdrop vault account (dedicated fund pool for NFT airdrop releases)

fields.name: is_active
docs: Whether binding is active (owner matches and NFT is in wallet)

fields.name: binding_info
docs: Binding info (None if PDA doesn't exist)

types.name: CommunityProfitClaimedEvent
docs: Triggered at the end of successful handler_claim_community_profit execution

fields.name: direct_reward_profit
docs: Direct reward profit (5% from direct referrals)

fields.name: total_community_profit
docs: Total community profit (sum of direct + team)

fields.name: total_output
docs: Total cumulative output across the network

types.name: GlobalState
docs: Global state account (PDA) - stores global data for staking

fields.name: stake_token_mint
docs: Staking token mint address (must match locked_vault)

fields.name: storage_pdas
docs: 9 ReferralStorage PDA addresses (computed at init, compared by key during validation)

fields.name: total_output
docs: Total cumulative output across the network (sum of all interest pool disbursements: interest + rewards + tax)

fields.name: reduction_count
docs: Current reduction count (number of halvings applied so far)

fields.name: daily_deposit_cap
docs: Current daily deposit cap (dynamically adjusted, initial 3 million tokens * 10^9)

fields.name: current_deposit_day
docs: Current statistics day (UTC day number: unix_timestamp / 86400)

fields.name: daily_deposited
docs: Total deposited amount for the current day

fields.name: diamond_pool_current
docs: Diamond pool current week accumulation (in progress, not claimable)

fields.name: gold_pool_current
docs: Gold pool current week accumulation (in progress, not claimable)

fields.name: diamond_pool_claimed_count
docs: Diamond pool previous week claimed count

fields.name: gold_pool_claimed_count
docs: Gold pool previous week claimed count

fields.name: stats_current_day
docs: Current statistics day for staking (UTC day number: unix_timestamp / 86400)

fields.name: today_staked_amount
docs: Today's total staked amount (cumulative amount from all create_stake calls today)

fields.name: last_7days_staked
docs: Last 7 days staked amounts (fixed index array)
[0] = 7 days ago, [1] = 6 days ago, ..., [6] = today (real-time updated)

fields.name: referral_fee_wallet
docs: Dedicated SOL receiving address for referral binding (collects registration fee, anti-Sybil)

types.name: InterestClaimedEvent
docs: Triggered at the end of successful handler_claim_interest execution

fields.name: base_interest
docs: Base interest (excluding NFT boost, before tax)

fields.name: user_receive
docs: Net interest received by user (after tax)

fields.name: nft_mint
docs: NFT Mint bound to user (Pubkey::default() if none)

types.name: LockedTokenVault
docs: Locked token vault account (permanently locked token pool)

fields.name: total_locked
docs: Cumulative total amount deposited into the vault (only incremented on lock_tokens).
NOT the current vault balance — outflows (unstake, interest, rewards) are NOT subtracted.

fields.name: last_pool_claim_week
docs: Last claimed node pool week number

types.name: NodePoolRefreshed
docs: Node reward pool weekly refresh event

fields.name: diamond_unclaimed_to_root
docs: Diamond pool unclaimed amount returned to root

fields.name: gold_unclaimed_to_root
docs: Gold pool unclaimed amount returned to root

fields.name: diamond_new_pool
docs: New diamond pool amount (last week -> claimable)

fields.name: gold_new_pool
docs: New gold pool amount (last week -> claimable)

fields.name: week_number
docs: Week number of the claimed reward

types.name: NodePoolRewardResult
docs: Node pool reward query result (per user)

fields.name: week_number
docs: Week number of the reward (previous week)

fields.name: reward_amount
docs: Claimable reward amount (0 if already claimed or no reward)

fields.name: is_claimed
docs: Whether the user has already claimed this week's rewards

fields.name: diamond_pool_current
docs: Current week diamond pool accumulation (not claimable)

fields.name: gold_pool_current
docs: Current week gold pool accumulation (not claimable)

fields.name: diamond_pool_claimed_count
docs: Diamond pool previous week claimed count

fields.name: gold_pool_claimed_count
docs: Gold pool previous week claimed count

fields.name: user_already_claimed
docs: Whether the user has already claimed previous week rewards

fields.name: base_interest
docs: Base interest (without NFT boost, before tax)

fields.name: after_tax
docs: Net interest received by user after tax

types.name: ReferralBindingEvent
docs: Triggered when user successfully binds a referrer

fields.name: total_referrals
docs: Total number of downline referrals (excluding self)

fields.name: total_staked
docs: Total staked amount of downline (including self, in tokens)

fields.name: self_staked
docs: Self staked amount (excluding downlines, in tokens)

fields.name: direct_reward_profit
docs: Direct reward profit (5% from direct referrals, in tokens)

fields.name: team_reward_profit
docs: Team reward profit (from level rewards, in tokens)

types.name: ReferralManager
docs: Management account, stores current active PDA index

types.name: ReferralStorage
docs: - N * 56 bytes: ReferralData records (stored directly in account raw bytes)

types.name: StakeCreatedEvent
docs: Triggered at the end of successful handler_create_stake execution

fields.name: order_index
docs: Order slot index in user account (0-14)

fields.name: period_type
docs: Staking period type (1=7 days, 2=30 days, 3=90 days)

fields.name: initial_daily_rate
docs: Daily rate snapshot at creation (basis points, 10000=100%)

fields.name: user_stake_cap
docs: Per-address staking cap applied to this transaction

fields.name: period_type
docs: Staking period type (1=7 days, 2=30 days, 3=90 days)

fields.name: accumulated_interest
docs: CI-08: Accumulated unclaimed base interest (without NFT boost)
Zeroed on claim/unstake; new_interest is added hourly in between

fields.name: claimed_interest
docs: CI-08: Cumulative total pre-tax interest claimed (including NFT boost)

fields.name: initial_daily_rate
docs: Initial daily interest rate at order creation time (in RATE_BASIS_POINTS, 1_000_000 = 100%)
Rate is snapshot at stake creation; existing orders are NOT affected by subsequent reductions.

types.name: TokensLockedEvent
docs: Triggered when tokens are locked into the vault

fields.name: total_locked
docs: Total locked amount after this operation

types.name: UnstakedEvent
docs: Triggered at the end of successful handler_unstake execution

fields.name: base_interest
docs: Base interest (excluding NFT boost, before tax)

fields.name: interest_to_user
docs: Net interest received by user (after tax)

fields.name: total_to_user
docs: Total amount received by user (principal + net interest)

fields.name: nft_mint
docs: NFT Mint bound to user (Pubkey::default() if none)

fields.name: total_principal
docs: Total staked principal (sum of all active orders)

types.name: UserState
docs: User state account (tracks user's current NFT binding)

fields.name: bound_nft_mint
docs: Currently bound NFT mint (Pubkey::default() if no binding)

types.name: WalletInfoResult
docs: Wallet information result (includes parent wallet address)

fields.name: parent_wallet
docs: Parent wallet address (Pubkey::default() if root node)

fields.name: total_referrals
docs: Total number of downline referrals (excluding self)

fields.name: total_staked
docs: Total staked amount of downline (including self, in tokens)
